title: Apologize
why_this_song: Apologize by OneRepublic (2007) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 17 times; first heard in: "That it's too late to apologize, it's too late"
Appears 16 times; first heard in: "That it's too late to apologize, it's too late"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "That it's too late to apologize, it's too late"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "I'm holding on your rope"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "I'm holding on your rope"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "late" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "late" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "it's" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "it's" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:

excerpts.text: Didn't think I'd turn around and say
Heaven let me think was you

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Apologize" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Apologize" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Apologize", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Apologize", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Apologize" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Apologize" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
